---
name: Agent / automation / integration request
about: Propose a non-UI workflow, agent-friendly integration, or automation-ready change
title: "[Agent] "
---

## Goal / 目标

What should an AI agent, automation, or integration be able to do?

你希望 AI agent、自动化流程或集成能力具体做什么？

## Entry point / 入口

Which interface should this use?

请选择它应该走的入口：

- CLI
- MCP server
- HTTP API
- GitHub workflow
- documentation only

## Workflow / 工作流

Describe the end-to-end flow in concrete steps.

请用具体步骤描述完整流程。

## Inputs and outputs / 输入与输出

What data goes in, and what should come out?

输入什么数据，输出什么结果？

## Safety and privacy / 安全与隐私

What must stay local, stay hidden, or never be automated?

哪些内容必须保留在本地、不能暴露，或者不应被自动化？

## Success criteria / 成功标准

How would we know this is good enough to ship?

什么情况下可以认为这个方案足够好，可以继续推进？

## References / 参考

Add links to docs, issues, code paths, or examples if available.

如果有相关文档、Issue、代码路径或示例，请补充链接。
